title: Prompt Generator
subtitle: Input simple words or phrases, AI will generate professional prompts for you

inputSection.title: Input Your Idea
inputSection.description: Input a simple word or phrase, select a prompt category
inputSection.inputPlaceholder: e.g. a mystery set in a haunted lighthouse

placeholders.general: e.g. a time traveler who can only go forward, never back
placeholders.image: e.g. a lonely astronaut floating above a dying planet
placeholders.video: e.g. a cinematic trailer for a dystopian love story
placeholders.code: e.g. an interactive story choice engine in React
placeholders.writing: e.g. a villain who believes they are the hero of the story
placeholders.marketing: e.g. launch copy for an AI-powered writing assistant app
placeholders.image-edit: e.g. transform the setting into a foggy Victorian street

inputSection.imageTooLarge: Image size must be less than 50MB
inputSection.imageProcessError: Failed to process image. Please try another image.
inputSection.videoTooLarge: Video size must be less than 5MB
inputSection.videoUploadError: Failed to upload video. Please try again.
inputSection.imageUrlHint: Paste a direct link to an image (JPG, PNG, WebP)
inputSection.invalidImageUrl: Failed to load image from URL. Please check the URL.
inputSection.invalidUrlFormat: Please enter a valid URL (e.g., https://example.com/image.jpg)
inputSection.invalidUrlProtocol: URL must start with http:// or https://

aiModels.generalImagePromptDesc: Natural language description of the image
aiModels.structuredPromptDesc: Splits into Subject, Environment & Visual Style for remixing
aiModels.graphicDesignDesc: Replicates professional design aesthetics, including typography, layout, and subject details
aiModels.fluxDesc: Optimized for state-of-the-art Flux AI models, concise natural language
aiModels.nanoBananaDesc: Optimized for Nano Banana AI image generation model
aiModels.midjourneyDesc: Optimized for Midjourney AI with parameters like --ar, --v, --style

videoModels.generalVideoPromptDesc: Natural language description with motion, camera, and temporal details
videoModels.structuredVideoPromptDesc: Splits into Subject, Environment, Visual Style & Motion/Camera for detailed analysis
videoModels.soraLumaStyleDesc: Photorealistic rendering with ray-tracing, physics-accurate materials and lighting
videoModels.socialViralDesc: Eye-catching visuals, fast-paced editing, vibrant colors for short-form video
videoModels.physicalDynamicsDesc: Fluid, destruction, gravity and complex physical interactions with high fidelity
videoModels.veo3CinematicDesc: Hollywood-quality filmmaking with professional composition and advanced camera movements

describeImageOptions.describeImageInDetailDesc: Comprehensive description covering all visible elements, colors, composition and context
describeImageOptions.describeImageBrieflyDesc: Concise summary capturing the key subject and main visual elements
describeImageOptions.describeThePersonDesc: Detailed description of people including appearance, expression and attire
describeImageOptions.recognizeObjectsDesc: Identify and list all distinct objects, items and elements in the image
describeImageOptions.analyzeArtStyleDesc: Analyze artistic techniques, style influences, color palette and composition
describeImageOptions.extractTextFromImageDesc: OCR extraction of all readable text, numbers and characters from the image
describeImageOptions.generalImagePromptDesc: Natural language prompt suitable for most AI image generation models
describeImageOptions.fluxPromptDesc: Optimized prompt format for Flux model with detailed scene descriptions
describeImageOptions.midjourneyPromptDesc: Midjourney-style prompt with parameters, aspect ratios and stylistic keywords
describeImageOptions.stableDiffusionPromptDesc: Tag-based prompt optimized for Stable Diffusion models
describeImageOptions.nanoBananaPromptDesc: Specialized prompt format for Nano Banana image generation pipeline

directResult.title: Generated Prompt
directResult.description: The prompt generated directly by the AI model based on your input, ready to copy and use

enhancedOptions.title: Prompt Settings
enhancedOptions.description: Configure your prompt style and describe your idea, AI will generate a professional prompt for you
enhancedOptions.guideDescription: Follow these steps to optimize your prompt using enhancement options:
enhancedOptions.guideStep1: Select values from the dropdown menus to refine your prompt requirements
enhancedOptions.guideStep2: If an option is not needed, select "None" to skip that option
enhancedOptions.guideStep3: Enter any additional requirements or details in the "Additional Custom Requirements" text box
enhancedOptions.guideStep4: Click the "Generate Enhanced Prompt" button to generate a more precise prompt based on your selections
enhancedOptions.customPlaceholder: Enter any additional requirements or details you want to include in the enhanced prompt...
enhancedOptions.combinationsDescription: Select a preset to quickly apply recommended option combinations

general.创意: Sets the level of creativity and divergence, from traditional to innovative.
general.分析: Determines the depth, breadth, and perspective of the analysis.
general.解释: Adjusts the complexity of the content to suit different audiences.
general.总结: Sets the granularity of information extraction, from key points to detailed summaries.
general.复杂度: Controls the depth and sophistication level of the output, from simple to academic.

image.风格: Determines the overall artistic style and visual tone.
image.色彩: Sets the color palette, saturation, and color scheme.
image.构图: Arranges the spatial position, perspective, and visual focus of elements.
image.细节: Controls the richness of textures, lighting, and small elements.
image.氛围: Creates the emotional tone and environmental feeling of the image.

video.镜头运动: Sets the camera movement style, such as panning, orbiting, or tracking, to create different visual experiences.
video.视觉风格: Defines the overall visual aesthetic, such as cinematic, animation style, or vintage film.
video.画面比例: Selects the video aspect ratio to fit different playback platforms and devices.
video.氛围基调: Sets the overall emotional atmosphere of the video, such as cheerful, mysterious, or epic.
video.音效: Describes the audio content of the video, such as ambient sounds, background music, or character dialogue.

code.语言: Specifies the programming language for the code.
code.框架: Selects the development framework or library.
code.功能: Defines the core business logic or operations to implement.
code.优化: Sets code quality focus, such as performance, readability, or memory usage.
code.测试: Specifies the verification method, such as unit testing or integration testing.

writing.文体: Sets the genre format, such as formal reports, essays, or press releases.
writing.语气: Adjusts the emotional color and attitude, such as serious, humorous, or friendly.
writing.长度: Controls the word count range and level of detail.
writing.受众: Sets the target audience characteristics to adjust wording and expression.
writing.目的: Clarifies the core intent of writing, such as informing or persuading.

marketing.平台: Specifies the distribution channel to adapt format and user habits.
marketing.目标: Clarifies the specific KPIs or effects expected from the marketing campaign.
marketing.CTA: Sets the call-to-action to guide users to perform specific operations.
marketing.情感: Injects specific emotional colors to resonate with the audience.
marketing.价值: Emphasizes the core benefits of the product or service.

创意.创新: Break through conventional thinking, propose novel and unique ideas.
创意.传统: Follow classic methods and established patterns, stable and reliable.
创意.现代: Combine contemporary trends and latest concepts, keeping up with the times.
创意.未来主义: Forward-thinking, exploring future possibilities and trends.
创意.复古: Draw from historical classics, recreating beautiful elements of the past.

分析.深度分析: Dig deep into the essence of problems, providing comprehensive analysis.
分析.简要分析: Quickly summarize key points, suitable for quick understanding.
分析.对比分析: Compare different solutions or viewpoints, highlighting differences.
分析.趋势分析: Focus on development directions and future trends, predicting changes.
分析.数据驱动分析: Based on data and facts, draw objective conclusions.

解释.简单解释: Use the most basic language that anyone can understand.
解释.详细解释: Provide comprehensive explanations with background and details.
解释.技术解释: Use professional terminology, suitable for technical personnel.
解释.通俗解释: Use everyday language, understandable for non-professionals.

总结.要点总结: Extract core information, highlight key points.
总结.详细总结: Comprehensive summary including main content and details.
总结.执行摘要: For decision-makers, highlighting action recommendations and conclusions.
总结.关键洞察: Extract deep insights, revealing essential patterns.
总结.行动建议: Provide specific and actionable next steps.

复杂度.简单: Basic and easy to understand, suitable for beginners.
复杂度.中等: Balanced depth and accessibility for general audiences.
复杂度.学术: Research-grade rigor with citations and methodology.

风格.抽象: Non-representational, focusing on shapes and colors.
风格.数字艺术: Modern CG style, clear and sharp.
风格.极简主义: Less is more, removing excess elements.
风格.吉普力: Studio Ghibli style, fresh and natural.

色彩.黑白: Classic monochrome, emphasizing light and shadow.
色彩.暖色调: Mainly red, yellow, orange; warm and enthusiastic.
色彩.冷色调: Mainly blue, green, purple; cool and deep.

构图.居中: Subject in the center, highlighting the core.
构图.三分法: Subject at 1/3, visually balanced and natural.
构图.对称: Left-right or top-bottom symmetry, stable and solemn.
构图.框架式: Using foreground to create a frame, guiding the eye.
构图.引导线: Using lines to guide vision to the subject.

细节.中等细节: Balanced overall and local, not too grabbing.
细节.低细节: High generalization, focusing on overall form.
细节.超写实: Extreme details, even beyond the naked eye.
细节.风格化: Artistic processing, not sticking to realistic details.

氛围.神秘: Full of the unknown, sparking curiosity.
氛围.温馨: Soft and warm, giving a sense of security.
氛围.冷酷: Cold and alienated, lacking emotional color.
氛围.梦幻: Illisory and hazy, beautiful like a dream.
氛围.科幻: Strong futuristic feel, full of tech elements.

尺寸.1:1: Square aspect ratio, suitable for social media avatars and Instagram.
尺寸.16:9: Widescreen landscape ratio, suitable for desktop and YouTube.
尺寸.9:16: Portrait ratio, suitable for mobile screens and TikTok.
尺寸.4:3: Traditional landscape ratio, suitable for old displays and photos.
尺寸.3:4: Portrait traditional ratio, suitable for mobile wallpapers and posters.
尺寸.21:9: Ultrawide ratio, suitable for movies and gaming scenes.
尺寸.自定义: Custom aspect ratio based on specific needs.

镜头运动.静止镜头: Camera remains fixed, suitable for static scenes or dialogue.
镜头运动.缓慢平移: Camera slowly moves horizontally or vertically, creating a calm atmosphere.
镜头运动.跟踪镜头: Camera follows the subject, enhancing immersion.
镜头运动.环绕镜头: Camera rotates around the subject, showcasing multiple angles.
镜头运动.推拉镜头: Camera moves toward or away from the subject, emphasizing key elements.
镜头运动.航拍视角: Overhead view from above, revealing grand scenes and wide vistas.
镜头运动.手持抖动: Simulates handheld shooting, creating an authentic feel.

视觉风格.电影级: High-quality cinematic visuals with professional color grading and lighting.
视觉风格.纪录片: Natural and authentic visual style, focusing on reality.
视觉风格.动画风格: Cartoon or CG animation effects, full of creativity and imagination.
视觉风格.复古胶片: Simulates vintage film texture with grain and retro color tones.
视觉风格.赛博朋克: Neon lights and tech-heavy futuristic style.
视觉风格.自然写实: Realistic natural imagery with rich, vibrant colors.
视觉风格.梦幻柔焦: Soft, hazy visual effect creating a dreamlike atmosphere.

画面比例.16:9横屏: Standard widescreen ratio, suitable for computer and TV playback.
画面比例.9:16竖屏: Portrait ratio, suitable for mobile and short video platforms.

氛围基调.欢快活力: Bright and upbeat, full of positive energy and vitality.
氛围基调.紧张悬疑: Creates tension, enhancing suspense and anticipation.
氛围基调.神秘奇幻: Full of mystery, creating a fantastical world.
氛围基调.温馨治愈: Warm and gentle, providing comfort and relaxation.
氛围基调.史诗壮阔: Grand and majestic, with awe-inspiring presence.
氛围基调.忧郁沉静: Calm and introspective, with a touch of melancholy.
氛围基调.激昂热血: Full of passion and fighting spirit, blood-pumping intensity.

音效.环境音效: Natural environmental sounds like wind, rain, bird songs, etc.
音效.背景音乐: Background music that complements the visuals and sets the mood.
音效.无声画面: Pure visual content without any audio.

语言.JavaScript: Universal for frontend and backend, rich ecosystem.
语言.Python: Simple syntax, ideal for data science and AI.
语言.C++: Excellent performance, suitable for system-level development.

框架.Express: Lightweight Node.js framework, flexible and fast.
框架.Flask: Lightweight Python framework, flexible and concise.

优化.性能优化: Improve runtime speed and response time.
优化.可维护性: Code easy to understand and modify.

测试.性能测试: Test system performance and load capacity.

文体.正式: Formal and rigorous, suitable for formal occasions.
文体.非正式: Casual and relaxed, suitable for daily communication.
文体.学术: Rigorous and standardized, meeting academic standards.
文体.商业: Professional and efficient, suitable for business scenarios.
文体.技术: Professional and accurate, suitable for technical documentation.
文体.新闻: Objective and factual, timely and accurate.

语气.专业: Rigorous and professional, authoritative and credible.
语气.友好: Friendly and approachable, closing the distance.

长度.简短: Concise and to the point, highlighting key points.
长度.根据内容: Flexibly adjust length according to actual needs.

受众.普通读者: For general public, easy to understand.
受众.专业人士: Use professional terminology, suitable for industry professionals.
受众.技术人员: Rich technical details, suitable for developers.
受众.消费者: For general consumers, easy to understand.

目的.告知: Convey information, let readers understand the situation.
目的.说服: Persuade readers to accept views or take action.
目的.娱乐: Provide entertainment, make readers feel interesting.

平台.社交媒体: Suitable for WeChat, Weibo, TikTok and other platforms.
平台.网站: Suitable for official websites, landing pages and other web scenarios.
平台.邮件: Suitable for email marketing, personalized push.
平台.博客: Suitable for long-form content, in-depth communication.
平台.视频平台: Suitable for Bilibili, YouTube and other video platforms.
平台.搜索引擎: Suitable for SEO optimization, improve search rankings.

目标.用户获取: Attract new users, expand user base.
目标.用户留存: Retain existing users, improve retention rate.

CTA.免费试用: Lower the threshold, attract users to try.

情感.归属感: Make users feel belonging, enhance stickiness.
情感.成就感: Make users feel achievement, improve satisfaction.

enhancedResult.title: Enhanced Prompt
enhancedResult.description: A more specific and targeted prompt generated based on your selected enhancement options
enhancedResult.englishTip: Tip: English prompts produce best results

aiEdit.title: AI Edit Prompt
aiEdit.description: Describe how you want to modify the prompt
aiEdit.placeholder: e.g., Make it more detailed, add more creative elements, simplify the language...
aiEdit.error: Failed to edit prompt. Please try again.

quickOptions.addDetail: Add more visual details and descriptions
quickOptions.simplify: Simplify and make the prompt more concise
quickOptions.moreArtistic: Make it more artistic and creative with unique visual style
quickOptions.moreRealistic: Make it more realistic and photographic
quickOptions.changeLighting: Enhance the lighting description with dramatic or cinematic lighting
quickOptions.focusSubject: Focus more on the main subject and reduce background details
quickOptions.changeComposition: Improve the composition with better framing and perspective
quickOptions.addMood: Add emotional mood and atmosphere to the scene

videoQuickOptions.addMotion: Add more motion and movement details, describe camera movements and subject actions
videoQuickOptions.cinematic: Make it more cinematic with professional camera work, dramatic lighting, and film-like quality
videoQuickOptions.addTransition: Add smooth transitions and pacing descriptions between scenes
videoQuickOptions.enhanceAtmosphere: Enhance the atmosphere and mood with emotional tone and ambient details
videoQuickOptions.improveCamera: Improve camera descriptions: add angles, movements (pan, tilt, dolly, zoom), and shot types
videoQuickOptions.addTiming: Add timing and pacing elements, describe duration, speed changes, and rhythm
videoQuickOptions.simplify: Simplify and make the video prompt more concise while keeping key elements
videoQuickOptions.addDetail: Add more visual details: colors, textures, lighting, environment, and subject descriptions

videoPromptQuickOptions.improveCamera: Keep the original scene description. Change camera movement to: camera slowly follows the subject in a 180-degree arc shot, starting from the front and circling around to the back. Preserve all original character, scene, and action descriptions.
videoPromptQuickOptions.cinematic: Keep original scene and action descriptions. Add these cinematic elements: soft golden hour backlighting, shallow depth of field with blurred background, 35mm film lens texture, subtle lens flare. Do not remove the core content.
videoPromptQuickOptions.addAudio: Keep original description. Add audio at the end: natural ambient sounds (wind, footsteps), soft piano background music synchronized with the visual rhythm.
videoPromptQuickOptions.enhanceMood: Keep original scene description. Enhance atmosphere: add warm color tones, floating dust particles in the air, soft shadow transitions, creating a warm and healing emotional mood. Keep original characters and actions unchanged.
videoPromptQuickOptions.addMotion: Keep original description. Add specific motions to the subject: subtle head turns, nuanced eye movements, gentle finger touches, clothes and hair gently swaying in the breeze. Ensure these blend naturally with the original scene.
videoPromptQuickOptions.changeStyle: Keep original scene and actions. Change visual style to cyberpunk: neon pink-purple lighting, rainy reflective ground, holographic projections, slight film grain. Original core content must be preserved.
videoPromptQuickOptions.simplify: Condense the prompt while keeping these core elements: 1. Main subject description 2. Key actions 3. Scene background 4. One primary camera movement. Remove redundant modifiers and output a concise version.
videoPromptQuickOptions.moreDetail: Keep original description. Add these visual details: skin texture and sheen, eye color and sparkle, clothing fabric textures, decorative elements in the background, light reflections on surfaces. Do not change original action and camera descriptions.

generalQuickOptions.expandDetail: Expand and add more details, examples, and explanations to make the content more comprehensive
generalQuickOptions.simplify: Simplify the content, use clearer and more concise language
generalQuickOptions.moreProfessional: Make the tone more professional and formal, suitable for business or academic contexts
generalQuickOptions.moreCasual: Make the tone more casual and friendly, easier to understand
generalQuickOptions.addExamples: Add practical examples and use cases to illustrate the points
generalQuickOptions.improveStructure: Improve the structure and organization, add clear headings and sections
generalQuickOptions.addSummary: Add a summary or key takeaways at the beginning or end
generalQuickOptions.moreCreative: Make it more creative and engaging, add unique perspectives or ideas

writingQuickOptions.moreCreative: Make the writing prompt more creative and imaginative, add unique storytelling elements
writingQuickOptions.addDetail: Add more details about characters, settings, and plot points
writingQuickOptions.enhanceTone: Enhance the writing tone to be more engaging and compelling
writingQuickOptions.addConflict: Add conflict, tension, or challenges to make the story more dramatic
writingQuickOptions.addDialogue: Add dialogue or character interactions to bring the scene to life
writingQuickOptions.improveStructure: Improve the narrative structure with better pacing and story arc
writingQuickOptions.addEmotion: Add more emotional depth and character feelings to the narrative
writingQuickOptions.simplify: Simplify the prompt to be clearer and more focused

marketingQuickOptions.morePersuasive: Make the copy more persuasive with stronger calls-to-action and compelling benefits
marketingQuickOptions.addEmotional: Add emotional appeal and storytelling elements to connect with the audience
marketingQuickOptions.addUrgency: Add urgency and scarcity elements to drive immediate action
marketingQuickOptions.focusBenefits: Focus more on benefits rather than features, emphasize value proposition
marketingQuickOptions.addSocial: Add social proof elements like testimonials, statistics, or case studies
marketingQuickOptions.makeConcise: Make it more concise and punchy for better engagement
marketingQuickOptions.addCTA: Strengthen the call-to-action with clear and compelling next steps
marketingQuickOptions.optimizeSEO: Optimize for SEO with relevant keywords while maintaining natural flow

generateText.title: Generated Content
generateText.description: Content generated based on the prompt above
generateText.pleaseWait: Please wait a moment, the high-quality image is being created...
generateText.canContinueBrowsing: You can continue reviewing your prompt while the image is being generated.

continueConversation.title: Continue Conversation
continueConversation.description: Enter your follow-up request to continue the conversation
continueConversation.placeholder: e.g., Rewrite this as an academic paper format

options.continueStory: Continue the story from where it left off, maintaining the same tone and style
options.addPlotTwist: Add an unexpected plot twist that changes the direction of the story
options.developCharacter: Develop the main character with more backstory, personality traits, and motivations
options.addDialogue: Add engaging dialogue between characters to bring the scene to life
options.buildTension: Build suspense and tension to create a more gripping narrative
options.writeEnding: Write a satisfying conclusion that wraps up the story
options.academicPaper: Rewrite this as an academic paper format
options.makeProfessional: Rewrite in a more professional and formal tone
options.addActionItems: Add actionable items and next steps
options.humanizeText: Rewrite this text to sound more natural and human-like. Vary sentence structure and length, use more conversational language, add personal touches, avoid repetitive patterns, and make it less formulaic. The goal is to make the text undetectable by AI detection tools while preserving the original meaning and key points.

continueConversation.error: Failed to continue conversation. Please try again.

generateImage.title: Generated Image
generateImage.description: Image generated based on the prompt above
generateImage.deleteWarning: ⚠️ Please download your image soon. Generated images will be automatically deleted after 7 days.

editImage.title: Edit Image
editImage.description: Describe how you want to edit the image
editImage.placeholder: e.g., Add a sunset background, change the color to blue, add more details...
editImage.noImageUrl: Image URL is required for editing. Please regenerate the image.

generateVideo.title: Generated Video
generateVideo.description: Video generated based on the prompt above
generateVideo.pleaseWait: Please wait, video generation may take 2-3 minutes...
generateVideo.stillProcessing: Video generation is still in progress. Please try again later.
generateVideo.expirationMessage: Video will be stored for {days} more day(s). Please download and save it promptly.
generateVideo.expired: This video may have expired. Please download it if still available.

errors.insufficientCredits: Insufficient credits. Required: {required} credits, Current balance: {current} credits. Please purchase more credits to continue.
